subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath turned unto the Ocean and attained that which was intended in the Books of God, the Mighty, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من اقبل الی البحر و فاز بما هو المقصود فی کتب الله العزیز الحکیم قد
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @law of Huququ'llah, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
